event.description:
Title: Grasping Gradle for Scala

Description:

An example-based primer on continuous integration using gradle for both personal and enterprise projects. The primary topic is gradle, but will also cover automated build systems (e.g. jenkins) and docker for isolated testing.

Speaker's short bio.

Frederick Kautz is a Senior Principal Software Engineer in the Office of the CTO at Red Hat and a Co-Organizer of Scala Bay. In previous positions, He was the CTO of a big data company and maintained a complex build system in the Java world. He has been writing scala professionally and has been active in the community since 2009.

Schedule

• 6:30-7:00 - networking

• 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc

• 7:10-~8:40 - talk

• 8:40-9:00 - networking
event.title: Frederick Kautz. Grasping Gradle for Scala
